title: Button Properties
description:
Button Properties

Button Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the Button control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

BackColorMode	Gets or sets the BackColorMode used
		 for a button control.

Default: 0 -
		 Visual Style

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	The type of task used for events.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Font	The font for the control text (design
		 time only).

Default: Microsoft
		 Sans Serif, 8.25pt.

FontBold	The bold attribute for the current font
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontItalic	The italic attribute for the current
		 font (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontName	The name for the current font (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: Microsoft Sans Serif

FontSize	The size for the current font in points
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 8.25

ForeColor	Selects the forecolor for the control.

Default: ControlText

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Image	The picture for the control. To delete,
		 press the <Delete> key.

Default: Empty

ImageAlign	Determines the alignment for an image
		 in the control.

Default: 5 -
		 MiddleCenter

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 Button control.

Default: ButtonXX

PressDelay	Sets the time
		 in msec until the event is executed after the control is clicked.
		 If you release the click button before the set time elapses, the
		 event will not execute.

Default: 0 -
		 Immediately Execute

PressSound	Sets whether
		 a beep sounds when the control is clicked.

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

Text	Sets the text for the button control.

Default: Name
		 of control

TextAlign	Selects the text alignment.

Default: 5 -
		 MiddleCenter

ToolTipText	The text used
		 in the control's tooltip.

Default: Empty

Top	The y coordinate of the control in pixels.

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not at runtime.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the control in pixels.

Event	Description

Click	Executes when the user clicks the control
		 with the mouse.
